title: Frangula surotatensis
preparations:
Frangula surotatensis is not a recognized species, however, I'll provide information on Frangula alnus (also known as Frangula surotatensis is not a valid species name, I'll use the name that seems to be based on the real one, Frangula alnus), which is a plant used in herbal preparations. 
Its preparations are used to treat various health issues, including constipation and liver problems. 
The root bark of the plant is typically used in herbal remedies. 
The plant's properties are attributed to its high content of anthraquinones, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. 
Preparations of Frangula alnus are also used in traditional medicine to stimulate bowel movements and improve digestion.
